why_phase5_guards_are_exhausted: Remaining examples no longer form a complaint subtype with clear lexical anchors.
Any new guard would reopen frozen complaint owners or broaden generic complaint-procedure handling.

surface_features: generic complaint verb without complaint subtype noun
candidate_bounded_phase6_mechanism.future_adjudication_rule: Only if shadow and runtime repeatedly disagree on the same generic-procedure cluster and one bounded complaint owner dominates telemetry.

risks_guardrails: Do not let shadow inference override complaint owners without allowlisting.
Prefer clarify over alternate owner when subtype evidence is weak.

examples: մասնագետի համար նախ բժիշկ պիտի տեսնե՞մ
մասնագետի մոտ գնալու համար ինչ է պետք

why_phase5_guards_are_exhausted: Named-specialist and MRI/CT slices are already moved; what remains is generic and crosses routing, policy, and entitlement boundaries.
Further phrase guards would steal valid routing or eligibility traffic.

surface_features: generic specialist noun vs named specialist
candidate_bounded_phase6_mechanism.future_adjudication_rule: Only adjudicate between referral-status and specialist-routing when free-care wording is absent and no destination verbs are present.

must_not_be_free_reasoned: whether a specialist visit is covered
whether referral is mandatory in a personalized case
risks_guardrails: If coverage words appear, keep eligibility authoritative.
If destination/arrangement words appear, keep routing authoritative unless telemetry proves otherwise.

why_phase5_guards_are_exhausted: The clean admission-policy slice is already moved; what remains is a timing/acceptance pocket with no single safe lexical boundary.
Broadening admission guards further would likely weaken the payment-dispute owner.

candidate_bounded_phase6_mechanism.future_adjudication_rule: Only prefer admission policy when hospital/inpatient anchors are strong and payment/dispute markers are absent.

risks_guardrails: Do not override payment-dispute owner on weak timing-only phrasing.
If evidence is weak, keep runtime behavior or clarify rather than reroute.

examples: Ի՞նչ իրավական ակտերով է ամրագրված քաղաքացիների իրավունքները ստանալ անվճար և արտոնյալ բժշկական օգնություն
Անվճար բուժօգնության իրավական հիմքը որն է
Արտոնյալ բուժօգնության իրավական հիմքը որն է

why_phase5_guards_are_exhausted: The free/subsidized-care legal-basis strand remains explicitly deferred because it overlaps strongly with eligibility wording.
Phase 5 narrow guards cannot solve this safely without weakening eligibility.

candidate_bounded_phase6_mechanism.type: shadow family discriminator with no live reroute initially
candidate_bounded_phase6_mechanism.future_adjudication_rule: Only consider rerouting toward legal-basis when legal/regulatory anchors dominate and no personal status or benefit-determination framing is present.

must_not_be_free_reasoned: whether a user qualifies for free care
risks_guardrails: Never let a semantic layer answer legal-basis questions directly.
Shadow inference may only rank eligibility vs legal-basis families, not produce the answer.
